evidence: "Do your funny bone a favor and rent this film which has some of the most outlandish scenes ever devised in a comedy."
"Greatly enjoyed by my dinosaur lover, and surprisingly, even by myself who really doesn't give a wit about dinosaurs, this film was very entertaining and provided more than a few laughs :)"
"The script writers certainly weren't overworked in The Wire. Every other word began with f and ended with k."
"Held my interest through Season 1, but not enough to look forward to watching a second."
"This is so well done, from filming, to costumes, to period detail, to scripting, to acting, that a five star rating doesn't seem enough."
"Difficult to give an impartial review when I think that Steve Buscemi is one of the sexiest men alive so I'm actually enjoying Boardwalk Empire more than the Sopranos."

summary: The user enjoys comedies and dramas, particularly those with high production quality and emotional resonance. They have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for straightforward storytelling that holds their interest without becoming convoluted.
